task_completion.description: JStock application is open and the watchlist area is visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JStock main window is visible, showing the stock table and watchlist tabs.

task_completion.description: The rename action is initiated for 'My Watchlist'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A context menu with 'Rename' selected, or a dialog box prompting to rename the 'My Watchlist' tab is visible.

task_completion.description: The new name 'Tech Giants' is entered into the rename field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'Tech Giants' is visible inside the text input field for the watchlist name.

task_completion.description: The watchlist tab is successfully renamed to 'Tech Giants'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The active watchlist tab in the JStock UI displays exactly 'Tech Giants' with correct capitalization and spacing.

task_completion.description: The renamed watchlist still contains the original 5 tech stocks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The stock table under the 'Tech Giants' tab displays the tickers AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL, AMZN, and NVDA.

integrity.description: The agent used the JStock graphical interface to rename the watchlist.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with JStock menus or dialogs, rather than a terminal window using 'mv' commands to rename the underlying directory.

integrity.description: The agent renamed the existing watchlist rather than creating a new one.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should only be the 'Tech Giants' tab (and any other default tabs), but NOT both a 'My Watchlist' tab and a 'Tech Giants' tab simultaneously.

integrity.description: The results are shown in the actual JStock application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI contains standard JStock elements (e.g., stock market indicators, specific toolbar icons) and is not a text editor or spoofed image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The original watchlist name is 'My Watchlist'. The target watchlist name must be exactly 'Tech Giants' (case-sensitive, with a space). The watchlist must contain exactly 5 stocks: AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL, AMZN, and NVDA. The underlying path modified by the application is /home/ga/.jstock/1.0.7/UnitedState/watchlist.
